arts.ttl: Barcelona SC Centenary Home, Away, Third & Goalkeeper Kits Released
arts.sum: Barcelona Sporting Club have unveiled their highly anticipated Centenary collection for 2025, celebrating 100 years since the club's foundation.

arts.ttl: Which Barcelona stars have played the most minutes in 2025?
arts.sum: An insight into the leaders in the first-team squad at La Liga giants Barcelona when it comes to minutes played this calendar year has on Thursday been provided. This of…

arts.ttl: UEFA Champions League Golden Boot Race Ahead of Semifinals: Guirassy, Raphinha, Lewandowski
arts.sum: Barcelona's Raphinha and Robert Lewandowski are chasing Serhou Guirassy in the Champions League golden boot race.

arts.ttl: Fort willing to play the waiting game at Barcelona
arts.sum: “He’s aware that his position is in high demand and there’s strong competition, but he’s still preparing for when the opportunity arises, although of course, like any young lad with his qualities and having grown up at La Masia, he’d like to get as many minutes as possible to contribute to the team.” One of Barca’s priorities is thought to be a full-back who can play on both flanks, and if a signing is made it’s hard to see where Fort fits in.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star won possession more times than any other player in UCL quarter-finals
arts.sum: A member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona won possession for his side more times than any other player in the quarter-final round of the Champions League.…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star not keen on summer exit despite Hansi Flick decision
arts.sum: Barcelona are keen to sign a new right-back this summer, with that decision being led by head coach Hansi Flick. The German is keen for competition to be given to current starter Jules Kounde, having been left unconvinced by the current level of Hector Fort, who is number two at the moment in the position. arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid the only teams with no players in UCL Team of the Week

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'put off' by €100m asking price of Chelsea-linked striker ahead of summer transfer window
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly taking a step back in the race for Benfica man Vangelis Pavlidis, who has a release clause of £85.9m in his current contract.

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Catalan giants 'make £47m Nico Williams decision' ahead of summer window
arts.sum: Barcelona will reportedly not reignite their interest in Athletic Bilbao attacker Nico Williams during this summer's transfer window.
